NOTIFICATION '12 New Delhi, the 17th July, 20 GS.R. 575(E).‚ÄĒWhereas certain draft rules further to amend the Drugs and CosmetcTi^ules.^rS^vvere published, as required by sections 12 and 33 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), vide notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (Department of Health), number GSR 853(E),‚ÄĘ dated the 1s t December, 2011, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 1st December, 2011, inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby before the expiry of a period of forty-five days from the date on which the copies of the Official Gazette containing the said notification were made available to the public; And whereas copies of the Gazette in which the said notification was published vvCic; M i d u c Q v a i i a u i u I U n i c J J U U H ^ U I I u i t ' u t u r i i i I U C I , t-\j > >, i n r l M i h o r o a c r v h i o H i r m c ; a n r l ci innoeti<"*nS re^^iv'F1 ^ i f r 9 S D S C t Of th.6 S 3 l d d r a t rules have been considered by the Central Government; -- 2 of 3 -- [*TFTII‚ÄĒ^rg-3(i)] 1TO1 ^f THXtf : m\Wm Drugs and c ^ s ^ c s ' ' A ^ V o ^ T ^ H ' e S ¬į ^ ^ ' ? ¬į ' ^ c o n a t i o n with the Drugs Technical AdvisoVBoa d hereby m ? t e s ^ f S i T ' further to amend the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945 name.‚ĄĘ ^ f U l e S 1- -(1) These rules may be called the Drugs and Cosmetics (4thAmendrr)ent) Rules, 2012 . " (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official'Gazette. 2. In the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, in rule 43-A, for the words "Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, Cochin, Nhava Sheva^ Kandla and Inland Container Depots at Tuglakabad and Patparganj, Delhi and Tuticorin in Tamil Nadu- in respect of drugs imported by sea into India. Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, Delhi, Ahmedabad and Hyderabad/ in respect of drugs imported by air into India.", the words "Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, Cochin, Nhava Sheva, Kandla, Inland Container Depots at Tuglakabad and Patparganj in Delhi, Tuticorin in Tamil Nadu and Marmugao port in Goa: in respect of drugs imported by sea into India. Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, - Delhi, Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Goa and Bengaluru: in respect of drugs imported by air into India." shall be substituted. [F.No. X-11014/4/2011-DFQCJ ARUNK. PANDA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note : The principal rules were published in the Official Gazette vide notification No. F 28-10/45-H(1), dated 21st December, 1945 and last amended vide numberGS.R. 76(E) dated the 8th February, 2012.
